texto: Pamela realizes for the first time in her life that she hadn't made the wrong choice at all. Nor had she made the right choice. She had simply made a choice. And somewhere along the way, she had lost the courage to live by it.
explicacao: Citação de Pip Karmel sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Pamela realizes for the first time in her life that she hadn't made the wrong choice at all. Nor …” articula coragem, choices, confidence em registro de coragem, com relevância para contextos como confidence e coragem.
